sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77823" key="parabo/skw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παραβόσκω</orth>, <sense id="n77823.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">maintain besides</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0450.tlg001:8:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ephipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
